name: Legacy CRM Decommission
purpose: Replace fragmented CRM tools (Lotus Notes contacts, Excel trackers) with Salesforce Sales + Service Cloud across European sales teams

name: Smart Affinage Monitoring
purpose: Deploy CaveGuard IoT sensors in Paris cheese aging caves to monitor temperature, humidity and pH in real time — pilot for 2 caves

name: Fromage-as-a-Service
purpose: Build La Boutique du Fromage — D2C e-commerce platform for cheese subscription boxes on AWS (React + Node.js)

name: Zero Trust Fromage
purpose: Implement Zero Trust security architecture — network segmentation, conditional access, endpoint compliance, and MFA everywhere

name: Workday Global Rollout
purpose: Extend Workday HCM from France to all subsidiaries — NL, IT and US payroll, talent management and workforce planning

name: SAP Cheddar Migration
purpose: Major S/4HANA upgrade program — migrate from SAP ECC to latest S/4HANA with cheese industry customizations, absorb AS/400 orders

name: Digital Cheese Passport
purpose: EU regulatory compliance — digital traceability passport for all AOP/DOP products, integrating CheeseTrack and CaveGuard data

name: Project Fondue
purpose: Cross-entity data warehouse on Snowflake — consolidate SAP, Salesforce, CheeseTrack and IoT data for advanced analytics and AI
